description.from: Deals 446(1+0.3Skill Level)+186.1% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 3 times to enemies in front, knocking them back and reducing their Attack Speed by 30% and Magic Defense by 35% for 4 sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals an additional 446(1+0.3Skill Level)+186.1% of Attack Power as Magic Damage.
description.to: Deals 446*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+186.1% ATK Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal area 3 times, pushing them back, and reduces their ATK Spd by 15% and Magic DEF by 10% for 4sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals additional 446*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+186.1% ATK Magic DMG.

description.from: Deals 608(1+0.3Skill Level)+253.4% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to 2 enemies and roots them for 3.6 sec. Enemies hit take continuous Magic Damage equal to 18% of Attack Power every 0.5 sec for 6 sec, and their Magic Damage taken is increased by 30%.
description.to: Deals 608*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+253.4% ATK Magic DMG to 2 enemy and inflicts Bind for 2sec. The damaged enemy takes 18% ATK Magic DoT every 0.5sec for 6sec, and Magic DMG taken is increased by 20%.

description.from: Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals 338(1+0.3Skill Level)+140.8% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 5 times. The final hit stuns them for 1.8 sec, and if they are not heroes, deals an additional 338(1+0.3Skill Level)+140.8% of Attack Power as Magic Damage.
description.to: Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals 338*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+140.8% ATK Magic DMG 5 times. The final hit stuns enemies for 1sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional 338*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+140.8% ATK Magic DMG.

description.from:
Critical Hit Chance is increased by 150, and each time you deal damage, you inflict [Lea's Curse] on the target for 10 sec.
[Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 250 and Attack is reduced by 25%.
description.to:
Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150. Each time damage is dealt, applies [Lea's Curse] to the target for 10sec.
[Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 100, and ATK is reduced by 10%.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 80%.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the target is changed to all enemies.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 2000, but the target is changed to all enemies.

dark.from: Root duration is increased by 0.9 sec.

light.from: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by 25%.
light.to: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 15% for 10 sec.

dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%.

light.from: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by {2}%. This effect stacks up to {3} times and cannot be dispelled.
light.to: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by 10%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.from: Reduces enemy M. Crit Resistance by 25% for 10 sec.
dark.to: Reduces the target’s Magic Critical Resistance by 20% for 10 sec.

dark.from: On critical hit, reduces the target's Status Resistance by 250 for 10 sec and reduces the cooldown of all other skills by 2%.
dark.to: On critical hit, reduces the target’s Status Resistance by 200 for 10 sec, and reduces the cooldown of all skills except the skill in use by 2%.

description.from: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces Heal Rate of the target by 50% and increases own Crit DMG by {0}% for 10 sec. Crit DMG increase effect can be stacked up to max 20 times.
description.to: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces target's Healing Rate by 35% for 10 sec and increases own Critical Damage by {0}%. The Critical Damage increase effect stacks up to 20 times.
